generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering angle adjustments for the vehicle chassis based on real-time ACC inputs"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance LowerLevelChassisController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls physical movement of the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle chassis (steering and speed) based on ACC system inputs"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR detects and tracks objects in vehicle's proximity using point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and Kalman filtering for object tracks"
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera provides 3D environmental data for perception and visualization"
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time data on ego vehicle speed for ACC state monitoring"
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time steering angle of the vehicle chassis"
]

// C3: Data Transmission Components
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point clouds through DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering generating object tracks (position, velocity, size)"
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle for ACC monitoring"
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    base:desc "Object detection tracks generated from processed LiDAR point clouds for ACC control logic"
]

instance ACCControlEvent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LowerLevelChassisController
    base:desc "Input events triggered by ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed adjustments)"
]

// C4: Data Storage
instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical object tracks and ego vehicle state data for troubleshooting and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, VehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D CAD-derived representations of vehicle and environment for real-time 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, IntelDepthCamera
]

// C5: Models
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering model using DBSCAN algorithm for object detection from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking from clustered LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 (Performance Class I) for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinEnabler
]

instance 3DVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-derived representations for real-time 3D visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo 3DVisualizationEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving paths via 3D virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle's resource-constrained ECUs to cloud/edge computing (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC remotely via Control Panel UI including enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and triggering emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data for troubleshooting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight
]

// C7: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving paths in real-time"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks (position, velocity, size) in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts ACC speed based on lead vehicle distance using cloud/edge processed data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator controls ACC via Control Panel UI (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking triggered remotely by operators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series analysis of object tracks and vehicle state for troubleshooting and analysis"
]

// C8: Enablers/Tools
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication and modular implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance JetsonOrinEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano platform for offloading ACC computation and running clustering/control models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance JetsonNXEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX platform for processing real-time sensor data and basic perception tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for storing historical object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance 3DVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization framework for rendering CAD-derived representations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson Orin Nano development and model execution"
]

instance PythonSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 SDK for rapid prototyping of data processing and visualization components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling (point cloud clustering)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Feature for aligning data formats between ROS2 and Wi-Fi communication protocols"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance OPCUAProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA (IEC 62541) protocol for data compatibility between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance CloudEdgeComputing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge infrastructure for offloading ACC computation and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

// C9: Physical Twin Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central Physical Twin Entity hosting automotive-specific ACC functionality not defined in ISO 23247"
    base:contains SteeringServo, MotorActuator, LowerLevelChassisController, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle chassis integrating lower-level and upper-level autonomy components"
    base:contains LowerLevelChassisController
]

instance AutonomyUpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis component hosting ACC system and perception modules"
    base:contains ACCControlLogicModel
]

// C10: Environment
instance AutomotiveTestingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, EgoVehicleChassis, AutonomyUpperChassis
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical twin through:
  - **Remote ACC control commands**: Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and triggering emergency braking via the Control Panel UI.
  - **Actuation signals**: The DT computes desired speeds (based on lead vehicle distance) and sends commands to the vehicle’s motor and steering servo via ROS2 communication.
  - **Latency-constrained transmission**: End-to-end latency must be ≤ **100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185) to ensure real-time system performance."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is governed by:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Clock accuracy of **≤ 100 ms** (due to hardware limitations) for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Data collection frequency**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state are updated every **perception cycle** (implied by LiDAR/Kalman filtering), with no explicit cycle duration specified but assumed to align with sensor refresh rates (e.g., ~10–30 Hz for LiDAR).
  - **Service latency**: End-to-end latency between the vehicle and DT must be ≤ **100 ms** for real-time control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as:
  - **Centralized Orchestration**: A single **Digital Twin Entity** aggregates data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic.
  - **Entity-Based Architecture**: Follows ISO 23247’s entity model with:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing and actuation.
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data storage, visualization, and reporting.
    - **User Entity**: Provides 3D visualization and control panel interfaces.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data alignment."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC system validation and simulation (e.g., 3D CAD integration for virtual prototyping).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., health monitoring of motors via DT data analysis).
  - **Lifecycle Coverage**: Represents the **operated** phase of the physical twin (as-manufactured and as-designed phases are not explicitly detailed but implied for development/testing)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic validated for Performance Class I.
  - **Validation**: Real-time synchronization and latency testing (≤ 100 ms) via 3GPP TS 22.185.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: LiDAR/Kalman filtering reduces sensor noise in object tracking.
  - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (≤ 100 ms) prevents timing drift in distributed systems."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **Communication Protocols**:
    - **ROS2 Network**: For intra-entity communication (e.g., between SW components on the vehicle).
    - **Wi-Fi (UDP)**: For inter-entity communication between the vehicle and DT Entity (e.g., remote management commands).
  - **Data Serialization**: Data Translation FE ensures compatibility between ROS2 and Wi-Fi message formats."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as:
  - **Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (for real-time processing) and Jetson NX (for sensor fusion).
  - **Cloud/Edge Offloading**: ACC computation is offloaded to external cloud/edge infrastructure for scalability.
  - **External Storage**: SQL database stores historical data externally to the vehicle."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system does **not** implement horizontal integration with external information systems beyond:
  - **Vertical Integration**: Offloading ACC computations to cloud/edge resources for scalability.
  - **Latency Requirement**: 3GPP TS 22.185 specifies V2V communication latency (<100 ms), but no actual V2V integration is described. The focus is on **vehicle-to-DT** communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for digital twin entities (Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, Data Collection/Control Entities).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control performance requirements (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (≤ 100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication.
  - **OPC UA/IEC 62541**: Potential for data translation FE implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**:
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: DT is a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (Sec III.A), ensuring operator oversight.
    - **Latency Constraints**: <100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP TS 22.185) prevents timing-based attacks and ensures ACC stability.
  - **Data Integrity**:
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for event ordering and distributed coordination.
    - **Data Translation FE**: Ensures message alignment and unit consistency to prevent corruption.
  - **Limitation**: No explicit mention of **cybersecurity** (e.g., encryption, authentication) or **accident prevention** beyond latency and human oversight."
]
